title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: We are going to do some face painting.
We are going to surprise each other.
The boss is not what you were going to say?
This is what I'm going to make Christie.

title: will / shall
examples: I'll think about that.
This will choke me.
I think they'll be shocked.

title: will / won't
examples: I won't have it, but after she has me and Helen is gone.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: You can show the camera.
Okay, I can't laugh when you do it.
You can actually do it.
But then it can choke you.
You can do both of them, I think.

title: may / might (possibility)
examples: Okay, the lips might look good.

title: have to / must
examples: You don't have to.

title: should (advice)
examples: No, you should trust me.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: That would not be a good ending.
Would you do it again?

title: Can/Could/Would you...?
examples: Can I open?

title: have something done
examples: So I've got a monkey butt, a minion and a ninja turtle nose.
